colorType.name: Color Type
colorType.description: Image color type (Grayscale, Truecolor, Palette, etc.)

filter.name: Filter Method
filter.description: Preprocessing filter method applied before compression (Default: 0)

interlace.name: Interlace
interlace.description: Progressive image rendering method (0: None, 1: Adam7)

chunks.name: Chunks
chunks.description: List of PNG structure and AI metadata chunks in the file

type.name: Chunk Type
type.description: Type of the chunk (e.g., tEXt, iTXt, zTXt, eXIf)

keyword.name: Keyword
keyword.description: Identifying keyword for the text chunk (e.g., Comment, Software, prompt)

data.name: Data
data.description: Actual text or binary payload stored in the chunk
